props.name: variant
props.description: Visual style. `separate` keeps each toggle's own style; `segmented` joins them.

props.name: orientation
props.description: Layout axis (purely visual — the group has no keyboard navigation of its own).

props.name: wrap
props.description: Let the toggles wrap onto multiple lines when they overflow the available width (e.g. a row of filter chips in a narrow panel). Only meaningful on a horizontal `separate` group; ignored when `segmented`.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional container name for screen readers (the group's aria-label); names the container, not the items.
